game_id.description: Must match P32 game_id spine exactly.

game_date.description: Game date; must be in 2024 MLB season.

home_team.description: Home team abbreviation; must match P32 spine.

away_team.description: Away team abbreviation; must match P32 spine.

p_oof.description: Out-of-fold model probability for home team win. Must be in [0, 1]. NEVER derived from y_true.

source_prediction_ref.description: Reference to prediction generation script and run ID.

generated_without_y_true.description: Flag certifying p_oof was generated without access to y_true. Must be True for EVERY row — no exceptions.

no_production_ready.rule: No prediction row may be used for live betting.
no_production_ready.enforcement: paper_only=True must be present in pipeline config.

no_y_true_derived_predictions.rule: p_oof must NEVER be derived from y_true / home_win / outcome.
no_y_true_derived_predictions.enforcement: generated_without_y_true must be True for all rows. Provenance audit required before use.

game_id_spine_match.rule: Every game_id in prediction import must match a P32 game_id.
game_id_spine_match.enforcement: Left-join on P32 game_identity; no unmatched rows allowed.

oof_temporal_integrity.rule: p_oof for game G must be generated using only data from games before G.
oof_temporal_integrity.enforcement: Walk-forward split must be verified; training cutoff < game_date.

p_oof_range.rule: p_oof must be in [0.0, 1.0] inclusive for all rows.
p_oof_range.enforcement: Validated during import; out-of-range values rejected.

season_2024_only.rule: Only 2024 MLB season predictions are permitted.
